title: Robinhood
subTitle: A fearless vigilante steals from the corrupt to help the poor, becoming a symbol of justice and rebellion in a system ruled by greed, deceit, and power-hungry elites.

title: Kotha Janta
subTitle: Sirish and Suvarna, two selfish individuals, team up to produce a new show. However, while working together, an emotional bond is formed between them and they fall in love with each other.

title: Sikindar
subTitle: Krishna travels to Mumbai to look for his missing brother Raju. However, things take a turn when learns that Raju was a notorious gangster in the city.

title: Mechanic Rocky
subTitle: While fighting to retain his father's garage, a mechanic discovers the true, chilling reasons behind the meddling of local gangsters.

title: Kalisundam Raa
subTitle: Raghavaiah agrees to invite his estranged son, Bhaskar's family for his birthday. Raghu, Raghavaiah's grandson, learns the reason behind Raghavaiah and Bhaskar's fallout and decides to reconcile them.

title: F3
subTitle: Venky and Varun, who plan on marrying rich women, fall into the trap of their own making when they realise the brides they are wooing are not wealthy but are, in fact, greedy for money.

subTitle: A financially struggling waiter's life drastically changes course when he learns of his rich lookalike, the CEO of a pharmaceutical company.

title: Jabilamma Neeku Antha Kopama
subTitle: A man is on the verge of marrying his childhood friend a year after his break up. In order to find out if he has truly moved, he decides to attend former girlfriend's wedding in Goa.

subTitle: Karthik, a businessman, gets married to a rich woman, to increase his wealth. However, things change, when he falls in love with an environmental activist, who files a suit against his company.

title: Jawan
subTitle: Driven by a personal vendetta, a man sets out to rectify the wrongs in the society to keep a promise made years ago.

title: Toby
subTitle: An innocent and mute man who is deprived of his daughter and lover pledges to be liberated from the wicked world and change himself for Jenny.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 2
subTitle: Rocky successfully rises as the leader and saviour of the people of the Kolar Gold Fields. But, in his goal to fulfil his mother's wishes, Rocky must tackle Adheera, Inayat Khalil and Ramika Sen.

title: Bhola Shankar
subTitle: A loving brother tries to make Kolkata his home with his sister. But a situation arises, facing him to go back to his past and also face gangsters to save his sister's life.

title: Prince and Family
subTitle: Prince remains a bachelor, despite his good qualities, However, chaos follows when he marries a woman who is his polar opposite.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Lingaa
subTitle: Lingaa, a petty thief, turns over a new leaf after realising the role his grandfather has played in building a dam for the villagers. He then dedicates his life to saving it from a corrupt minister.
